title: Auth configuration docs and test coverage
description: Document Authentik/OIDC setup (config fields, redirect URI registration, required Authentik-side application config) and add test coverage for the login/callback/logout flow, including failure paths.
acceptance_criteria: config.example.yaml documents auth.enabled, auth.issuer, auth.client_id, auth.client_secret, auth.redirect_uri with comments
A setup doc (README section or docs/) walks through registering the app as an Authentik OIDC provider/application
Tests cover: successful login/callback, invalid ID token rejection, logout clearing session, auth.enabled=false leaving all routes unauthenticated
Tests do not require a live Authentik instance (mocked/stubbed OIDC responses, consistent with the existing test suite's approach to external HTTP dependencies like the eBay API)
